hero.title: Crafting interfaces people remember.
hero.subtitle: 6+ years turning ambitious product ideas into fast, accessible, and beautifully engineered UI — across Angular, React, and modern design systems.

featuredProjects.title: Artem Health Care
featuredProjects.blurb: A patient-first healthcare platform UI focused on clarity under pressure — fast record lookups, accessible forms, and a design system built to scale across care teams.

featuredProjects.title: Compito
featuredProjects.blurb: A project and task management workspace redesigned around focus — drag-and-drop boards, real-time status updates, and a component library shared across the product.

featuredProjects.title: Valyxto
featuredProjects.blurb: A fintech-facing dashboard rebuilt for trust and speed — dense data made scannable through typography, motion, and a consistent visual hierarchy.
